theme_and_archetype.vibe: Warm, inviting, sensory, modern, and appetizing. Avoids sterile corporate 'SaaS' looks.
theme_and_archetype.admin_differentiation: The user-facing app uses generous padding, large border radii, and soft shadows for an immersive experience. The admin panel shifts to Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) characteristics: tighter spacing, denser data views, flat surfaces with subtle borders, prioritizing speed and utility over emotion.

fonts.heading: Outfit (Geometric, warm, structural) - Fallback: System sans-serif
fonts.body: Manrope (Clean, highly legible on mobile displays) - Fallback: System sans-serif

rules: No Inter or Roboto for headings.
Never center-align long paragraphs; left-align by default.
Primary CTA buttons must use #C84B31 with #FFFFFF text.
Never use pure black (#000000). Always use #2D2825.
Admin Panel: Change background to #FFFFFF and surface to #F9F6F0 for functional contrast.

spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12 (Generous padding)

border_radius.user_app: rounded-3xl (24px) for main cards, rounded-2xl (16px) for inner elements

layout_rules: Mobile-First execution using ScrollView and FlatList.
Bento Grid: Use varying card sizes on the Home Screen for Offers of the Day.
Generous Spacing: Cards must have internal padding of p-6 to avoid text collision.
Images should never exceed 80vh. Hero images in Outlet Detail should be edge-to-edge (no horizontal padding).

cards.user_outlet_card: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-3xl p-4 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(45,40,37,0.06)] border border-[#E5DFD3]/50. Image occupies top 60%, content bottom 40%.
cards.admin_card: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-lg p-4 border border-[#E5DFD3] shadow-sm. Flat design, no heavy drop shadow.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C84B31] text-white rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 font-bold text-center flex-row justify-center items-center active:opacity-80
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F9F6F0] text-[#2D2825] rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 font-bold text-center border border-[#E5DFD3]
buttons.category_chip: px-5 py-2 rounded-full border border-[#E5DFD3] mr-2 active:bg-[#C84B31] active:text-white

inputs.user_form: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E5DFD3] rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 text-[#2D2825] font-body text-base placeholder-[#7A7571]
inputs.admin_form: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E5DFD3] rounded-md px-3 py-3 text-[#2D2825] font-body text-sm

screens.user_home: Header with greeting and search. 'Offers of the Day' horizontal FlatList using large bento-style cards. Vertical FlatList for Outlet listing cards. Bottom Tab Navigation (Home, Search, Profile).
screens.outlet_detail: Edge-to-edge hero image at the top. Back button overlay in glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-md). Outlet info (Name, Status, Hours) pushed up via negative margin to overlap hero image. Horizontal scroll for categories. Vertical list for menu items.
screens.reservation_form: Clean, input-heavy screen. Only accessible from Gallops Restaurant. Date and Time pickers, Guest counter.
screens.admin_dashboard: Tabbed layout (Outlets, Menu, Offers, Reservations). Dense lists with swipe actions or edit/delete icons. Status toggles (Open/Closed). Image upload placeholders.

images.description: High quality flatlay of modern Indian thali (Use for Offers of the Day banner)
Burger and fries (Use as thumbnail for fast food outlet)
Coffee and pastries (Use as thumbnail for cafe outlet)

technical_instructions.styling: Use standard React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind (Tailwind). The guidelines provide Tailwind classes for ease of mapping.
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) MUST have a `testID` attribute (React Native equivalent of data-testid). Use kebab-case (e.g., `testID="call-outlet-button"`).
technical_instructions.motion: Use React Native Reanimated or LayoutAnimation for smooth transitions on layout changes (e.g., opening a category, filtering menus). Add active opacity to all TouchableOpacities.
